creator: a52ca063@gmail.com
text:
Hi James,

Thanks - that patch built for me on 14.2-RELEASE-p2.

It did prompt me to accept configuration for Apache Ant, Autoconf, m4, Automake, and something else.

It installed fine and I am running Intellij!

I opened my existing project with about 70k lines of code and it it worked just fine.  I also, ran a sample program and used the debugger, all without issue.

Thanks James!

Much appreciated.
